page: Vultr vc2-1c-0.5gb is an entry-level virtual machine belonging to the Cloud Compute server family. It features a single shared Intel x86_64 vCPU paired with 0.5 GB of system memory. For local storage, the instance includes a 10 GB NVMe SSD. It also comes provisioned with one complimentary public IPv4 address.

Because the CPU allocation is shared, this server type is subject to resource contention from other tenants on the host system. The 0.5 GB memory capacity limits the execution of memory-intensive processes. The absence of advanced CPU flags, such as Advanced Vector Extensions (AVX) or cryptography acceleration, restricts its utility for complex mathematical computations, vector processing, and hardware-accelerated encryption tasks.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, this instance represents a highly economical tier designed for minimal resource footprints. It is structured for lightweight workloads that do not require dedicated CPU cores or large memory allocations. Suitable use cases include basic web serving, simple scripting, lightweight cron jobs, DNS hosting, or acting as a minimal development sandbox.
description: Vultr vc2-1c-0.5gb is an entry-level virtual machine within the Cloud Compute family, configured with one shared Intel x86_64 vCPU and 0.5 GB of RAM. Local storage is provided by a 10 GB NVMe SSD, and the instance includes a single complimentary public IPv4 address. Due to its shared CPU allocation and low memory capacity, this server is designed for lightweight, non-resource-intensive operations. It lacks advanced CPU instruction sets such as AVX and hardware-accelerated cryptography, making it unsuitable for heavy computational or analytical tasks. Qualitatively, this instance offers a highly budget-friendly option for running basic services. It is best suited for minimal workloads such as simple web serving, lightweight scripting, cron jobs, or basic development environments where resource demands are consistently low.
og_description: Vultr vc2-1c-0.5gb is an entry-level Cloud Compute virtual machine configured with one shared Intel x86_64 vCPU, 0.5 GB of RAM, and a 10 GB NVMe SSD, designed for lightweight utility workloads.

tagline: An entry-level virtual machine with shared CPU resources and NVMe storage configured for lightweight utility workloads and basic development tasks.
bullet_points: Best suited for lightweight cron jobs, simple scripting, and basic web serving
